name: High-Stability Gyro (ONI2801)
description: Onisiki drift gyro. No PC software - gain is set on the gyro or a spare transmitter channel; tuning uses the ONI4602/ONI4606 LCD program box.
notes: Hardware-only device: no downloadable PC configuration software. Onisiki 403s datacenter IPs (CI) while serving the same URLs fine to residential ones - validate_catalog treats 403 as alive for this reason. Their own manuals index links several PDFs via dev.onisiki.com, a staging host that 403s everywhere; always use www.onisiki.com.
